details.finding: saveCustomAgents has save race — prev captured at call time, no IPC ordering. handleConfirmDelete uses full-list re-save via saveCustomAgents. Error toasts use hardcoded English.
handleSave has no try/catch — crypto.randomUUID() and props.onSave() can throw silently. dialog.close() runs regardless of error. Temperature/topP parsing uses parseFloat without comma sanitization.

No dedicated delete IPC handler for custom agents — delete goes through full-list re-save. isValidAgentDef doesn't validate temperature/top_p types. Pattern exists for dedicated IPC channels in MCP/plugin config handlers.
